summary: Tested sessionStorage migration and PWA banner features. All core functionality working correctly.

sessionStorage_migration.token_in_sessionStorage: PASS - sessionStorage.getItem('punchlist_token') returns valid token after crew login

pwa_banner_crew.banner_renders: PASS - pwa-install-banner visible after firing beforeinstallprompt event
pwa_banner_crew.dismiss_works: PASS - clicking pwa-dismiss-btn hides banner and stores plj_pwa_dismissed=1 in sessionStorage

pwa_banner_contractor.no_banner_for_contractor: PASS - PWA banner NOT shown for contractor role (App.js correctly gates on user.role === 'crew')

critical_code_review_comments: PWA banner uses beforeinstallprompt event which won't fire on HTTP/non-PWA-compliant environments - this is expected behavior, banner correctly shows when event fires or on iOS
Note: beforeinstallprompt was manually dispatched in tests since headless browser doesn't fire it automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: sessionStorage migration fully working. PWA banner works for crew (gated by role), doesn't show for contractor. manifest.json and sw.js accessible. Dismiss stores key in sessionStorage.
